channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Pre-Order Bonuses and More Leak
item.content:encoded:
The upcoming Halo: Campaign Evolved is expected to be featured at the Xbox showcase on Sunday. However, new information and images have begun to leak concerning the game’s pre-order bonuses

Halo: Campaign Evolved is the reimagined take on the first Halo game’s campaign. It’s been 25 years since the Halo franchise launched alongside the original Xbox. This game is a tribute to that experience and, no pun intended, also evolves it. Now, check out some of the cosmetics and weapon skins available for those who pre-order the game.

Halo: Campaign Evolved Pre-Order Content

Thanks to @Mr_Rebs_ on social media, it’s known that if you pre-order, you’ll receive the Foundry Armor Pack. This pack includes legendary designs for Master Chief’s iconic armor, featuring the Classic 2001 Mark V Armor skin, the Classic 2001 Assault Rifle skin, the Gilded Onyx Armor style, and the Gilded Onyx Assault Rifle style.

Also, there are some benefits for the Premium Edition of the game. Those include:

  • Splintered Warden Armor skin
  • Subanese Fang Energy Sword skin
  • Lochagos Armor skin
  • Laconian Lance Battle Rifle skin
  • Mobile Armor Type 117 Armor skin
  • Proto Type SPNKr skin
  • Gestalt Armor skin
  • Colossus Fuel Rod Cannon skin
  • ‘Cold Iron: Keyes’ personal sidearm skin
  • Timberwolf Armor skin
  • Savage Tooth Sniper Rifle skin

Also, you can check out leaked new images of the game.

Of course, the big news with this game is that it’s the first Halo game to be released on a PlayStation console, as it’s coming to PlayStation 5. Since that announcement, much has changed at XBOX. New XBOX CEO, Asha Sharma, has stated that the company will reevaluate its approach to exclusives. Learn more here.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered Announced
item.content:encoded:
The trilogy that launched Agent 47’s journey to gaming superstardom has been rebuilt and is coming soon for PC and all major platforms. It’s been more than a quarter century since Codename 47 was first released in 2000 for the PlayStation 2. Since then, there have been numerous games and even a movie. But this Trilogy will take you back to the beginning.

Featuring Hitman: Codename 47, Hitman 2: Silent Assassin, and Hitman: Contracts, this remastered Trilogy will feature restored visuals, a new photo mode, and more.

HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered Details

As announced by Saber Interactive and IO Interactive on June 5, players will get to experience the original trilogy with upgraded character models, enhanced environments, and high-resolution textures. They also invited players to experience the progression of the games from an open-ended experiment to a refined system with a dark psychological tone.

“The legendary trilogy that forged the HITMAN legacy has been painstakingly rebuilt, honoring the ruthless atmosphere and unparalleled agency that defined a series. Whether returning to the field or taking on your first assignment, HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered will provide the ultimate entry into Agent 47’s early career,” the game announcement reads.

In 2026, IO Interactive has been riding high off the success of 007: First Light. The game became one of the company’s best-selling titles and one of the best-reviewed titles of all time in short order. Learn more about that here.

Insider Gaming will continue to share more news about this remastered trilogy whenever more details get shared. Check out everything announced during Summer Games Fest on June 5 here. Sound off about this story and all others on our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
